content.en:
Guheng Mountain.

After obtaining some of the source stones on the other side, Ye Tian began to use these source stones on the other side to continue refining the immeasurable bones, refining the immeasurable bones one by one to seven bone transformations.

But.

If the immeasurable bone of the other side level genius wants to complete the seven bone transformations, he needs to spend more source stones on the other side.

Therefore, he is not enough to use the source stone on the other side now, but he can quench a few roots.

With the passage of time, the immeasurable bones were tempered to seven bone transformations.

Other than that.

Ye Tian has also been creating the Divine Power Technique on the Other Side, although he has failed countless times, he finally succeeded in creating the third Divine Power Technique on the Other Shore one day.

Somewhere on the other side of eternity.

Ye Tian punched and smashed all over the space-time area.

"This punch is very good, let's call it the real fist of the other side!"

He created this True Fist for the Eternal Great Ape Vest.

Before, outside the crack of the territorial sea boundary, he used the magic technique of the other side of the golden mang, and those blood kun saw it.

Therefore, this other side of the magic power has been revealed, if the Eternal Giant Ape Horse Armor casts this other side of the magic power, then there is a risk of exposure.

So.

He was going to recreate an offensive supernatural technique for this vest to use.

After creating the True Fist of the Other Shore and using it, Ye Tian's Origin on the Other Shore has grown, his physical body has become stronger, and his strength has also increased a little.

......

Junzu Palace.

Ye Tian's Eternal Giant Ape Vest came here again, and as before, he once again studied the technique of creating supernatural powers on the other side, while Jun Zu was watching from the side.

Jun Zu naturally didn't think that Ye Tian would succeed this time, so he was ready to protect Ye Tian's body in time when Ye Tian failed.

He closed his eyes and practiced, leaving only a trace of his mind on Ye Tian's body, without paying too much attention.

This time.

Ye Tian re-practiced it according to the creation method of the True Fist on the other side.

Finally.

Rumble!!!!!

The True Fist of the Other Shore was unleashed by him, and the seed of the Origin Power of the Other Shore in his body grew, and then the whole body was wrapped in countless Origin Power of the Other Shore.

"It's ......"

Jun Zu was shocked, and stared at the power of the origin on the other side that enveloped Ye Tian.

He still doesn't understand, this is a sign of becoming a genius on the other side!

"Okay, great!"

Jun Zu was extremely excited.

He accepted more than one apprentice, and each apprentice had the hope of becoming a genius at the other side, but in the end, the other apprentices gave up one by one.

After all, for countless years, he has been studying the magic skills of the other side, and he can't even practice normally.

100,000 primeval eras!

Millions of primeval eras!

Even in the 10 million primeval eras, it is almost hopeless research and creation, even if Jun Zu saves his life, but countless years, countless heavy injuries, and countless healings.

It can be said that cultivation has not been able to improve, and it has been in a state of stagnation.

Who can stand this?

As a result, his apprentices have now given up.

Jun Zu only had a glimmer of hope for Ye Tian, thinking that Ye Tian's hope was greater, as long as Ye Tian kept insisting, there was still hope to become a genius on the other side, but he was afraid that Ye Tian would not be able to hold on.

Unexpectedly, how long has it been, and Ye Tian has become a genius on the other side!!!!

This is definitely not the reason for the high potential and perception, but luck!

"My apprentice is really lucky, the creation of the other side of the magic power, can only rely on the creation of the other side of the magic power, if you are lucky, you will indeed be lucky to create success, but to create the second other side of the magic power, there is not such good luck, it will take endless long years. Jun Zu muttered.

But as long as you become a genius on the other side, this is what countless geniuses dream of!

"Hahaha, our True Beast Alliance also has a genius on the other side!"

Jun Zu was very excited.

However, he did not immediately publicize it, but continued to guard, waiting for Ye Tian to complete the final transformation and become a real genius on the other side, and then publicize it.

Time passes slowly.

this day.

Ye Tian's vest finally completed the transformation and became a genius on the other side.

After becoming a genius on the other side, Jun Zu took Ye Tian to announce it.

Soon.

The entire True Beast Alliance, the other bone transformation realms, all knew that Ye Tian's Eternal Behemoth Beast Vest Winter Cloud Lord had become a genius at the other side, and they were all envious.

And the Eternal Giant Ape Clan was directly dumbfounded, they didn't expect that the Lord of Winter Clouds in their clan would actually cross the boundary-breaking genius and the primeval-level genius from an ordinary Eternal Giant Ape in a short period of time, and become a Peer-level genius.

It's unbelievable!

Subsequently.

Jun Zu held a feast for Ye Tian's Vest Winter Cloud Lord to celebrate his becoming a genius on the other side.

For this feast alone, Ye Tian received a lot of resources.

The feast went on for a long time before it ended.

......

"Master!"

Ye Tian came to Jun Zu again.

At this time, Jun Zu took out three hundred source stones from the other side.

"Dongyun, these source stones from the other side should be regarded as a reward for you by your teacher, to celebrate that you have become a genius of the other side!"

Jun Zu is very generous.

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian hurriedly thanked.

Three hundred source stones from the other side, this is a lot of money, and it can be obtained without any cost.

After having these three hundred source stones from the other side, he was going to first upgrade this vest to the sixth bone transformation realm, which was also to let Jun Zu know that he had used it.

If he didn't improve his cultivation, Jun Zu would definitely wonder where the source stone on the other side was used.

When the time comes, he will not be able to explain it.

As for the other source stones, he secretly gave his true body copy body, and let the real body copy body to refine the immeasurable bone.

After a while.

The cultivation of the Lord of Winter Clouds, the vest, was raised to the extreme of the Fifth Bone Transformation Realm with the help of the Source Stone on the other side, and he also encountered a bottleneck.

It is very difficult for a genius on the other side to break through the bottleneck.

The easiest way to break through is to use the second Divine Power Technique of the Other Shore to break through, but it is very difficult to create the Divine Power of the Other Side.

Of course.

The other side level genius created the magic power of the other side will not fall, at most the injury is not light, and it can be recovered.

Therefore, many other side level geniuses still want to rely on the long years to create a second other side of the magic technique, so that they can break through the realm 100%.

If you don't want to waste time, then look for opportunities again and again, use countless other top resources to forcibly break the bottleneck, fail again and again, and there will always be a time to succeed.

Ye Tian didn't need to find resources, nor did he need to create the magic power of the other side.

He himself has created three other side magic powers, and this Winter Cloud Lord Vest has only used one of the other side magic skills!

Thereupon.

He also integrated the magic technique of the other side of the golden mang, which was on the other side, into the body of the vest, causing the power of the origin of the other side to skyrocket.

Click!

The bottleneck is cracked!
